revision.comment: Auto generating page. date placed far in the past so it is attributed to Immanuelle and FireflyBot sends them messages if it is ever imported to Wikipedia.

revision.text:
{{Documentation subpage}} {{High-use}} === Usage === {{wikisource-inline|Wikisource work}} This template creates an inline link to Wikisource in list format. === Examples === ==== Normal ==== {{wikisource-inline|Work}} {{wikisource-inline|Work}} ==== Text override ==== {{wikisource-inline|Work|Puffle}} {{wikisource-inline|Work|Puffle}} ==== Link to a single text ==== {{wikisource-inline|Work|single=true}} {{wikisource-inline|Work|single=true }} ==== Full link override ==== {{wikisource-inline|links=[[s:EB1911|]] and [[s:The New Student's Reference Work|]]}} {{wikisource-inline|links=[[s:EB1911|EB1911]] and [[s:The New Student's Reference Work|The New Student's Reference Work]]}} ==== List format ==== * {{wikisource-inline|list= ** [[s:EB1911|]] ** [[s:The New Student's Reference Work|]] }} *{{wikisource-inline|list= ** [[s:EB1911|EB1911]] ** [[s:The New Student's Reference Work|The New Student's Reference Work]] }} === See also === * {{tlx|Commons-inline}} * {{tlx|Commons category-inline}} * {{tlx|Wikinews-inline}} * {{tlx|Wikiquote-inline}} * {{tlx|Wikispecies-inline}} * {{tlx|Wiktionary-inline}} * {{tlx|Wikiversity-inline}} * {{tlx|Ws}} * {{tlx|wikisource}} - to create the sidebox * {{tlx|cite wikisource}} * {{tlx|Wikisource redirect}} [[Help:Interwiki linking]] provides easy ways to link to another project entry to permit you to formulate your citation however you choose: {| class="wikitable" ! Project ! Long form ! Shortcut ! Pagename template ! Inline template |- | [[Wikipedia]] | [[wikipedia:]] | [[[[w:]]]] | {{tlx|Wikipedia|Pagename}} | |- | [[Wiktionary]] | [[[[wiktionary:]]]] | [[[[wikt:]]]] | {{tlx|Wiktionary|Pagename}} | {{tlx|Wiktionary-inline|Pagename}} |- | [[Wikinews]] | [[[[wikinews:]]]] | [[[[n:]]]] | {{tlx|Wikinews|Pagename}} | {{tlx|Wikinews-inline|Pagename}} |- | [[Wikibooks]] | [[[[wikibooks:]]]] | [[[[b:]]]] | {{tlx|Wikibooks|Pagename}} | {{tlx|Wikibooks-inline|Pagename}} |- | [[Wikiquote]] | [[[[wikiquote:]]]] | [[[[q:]]]] | {{tlx|Wikiquote|Pagename}} | {{tlx|Wikiquote-inline|Pagename}} |- | [[Wikisource]] | [[[[wikisource:]]]] | [[[[s:]]]] | {{tlx|Wikisource|Pagename}} | {{tlx|Wikisource-inline|Pagename}} |- | [[Wikisource]] (common repository) | [[[[oldwikisource:]]]] | | {{tlx|WikisourceWiki|Pagename}} | |- | [[Wikispecies]] | [[[[species:]]]]
[[[[wikispecies:]]]] | | {{tlx|Wikispecies|Pagename}} | {{tlx|Wikispecies-inline|Pagename}} |- | [[Wikiversity]] | [[[[wikiversity:]]]] | [[[[v:]]]] | {{tlx|Wikiversity|pagename}} | {{tlx|Wikiversity-inline|Pagename}} |- | [[Wikimedia Foundation]] | [[[[wikimedia:]]]]

[[[[metawikipedia:]]]] | [[[[m:]]]] | {{tlx|Meta|Pagename}} | |- | Strategic planning | [[[[strategy:]]]] | | | |- | [[Wikimedia Foundation|Wikimedia Incubator]] | [[[[incubator:]]]] | | {{tlx|Incubator|Pagename}} | |- | [[MediaWiki]] | [[[[mediawikiwiki:]]]] | [[[[mw:]]]] | {{tlx|MediaWiki|Pagename}} | |- | [[quality:|MediaWiki Quality]] | [[[[quality:]]]] | | | |- | [[Phabricator]]
(formerly [[Bugzilla]] and MediaZilla) | [[[[phabricator:]]]]

[[[[mediazilla:]]]] | [[[[phab:]]]] | | {{tlx|Phab|Task}} |- | [[nost:|Nostalgia]] | [[[[nost:]]]] | | | |- | [[testwiki:|Test Wikipedia]] | [[[[testwiki:]]]] | | | |} As in * Hopkins, Samuel. ''[[Wikisource:Come not, when I am dead|Come not, when I am dead]]''. == TemplateData == {{TemplateData header}} { "params": { "1": { "label": "Wikisource pagename", "description": "The page name as on Wikisource. Pulls from Wikidata if possible.", "type": "string", "suggested": true }, "2": { "label": "Displayed text", "description": "The text to display inline for this link. Defaults to current page name.", "type": "string", "suggested": true }, "single": { "label": "Single work?", "description": "Whether to change the text to indicate \"The full text\" instead of \"Works\".", "example": "true", "type": "boolean", "autovalue": "true" }, "list": { "label": "List", "description": "List of links to put below as a list instead of inline.", "type": "string" }, "links": { "label": "Links", "description": "Multiple links to list inline. Changes the text after \"Works related to\". Use [[s:link]].", "type": "string" }, "extratext": { "label": "Extra text", "type": "string" } }, "description": "This template creates an inline link to Wikisource in list format." } {{Sandbox other|| [[Category:Wikisource link templates|Wikisource-inline]] [[Category:Inline interwiki link templates|Wikisource-inline]] }}
